name: The Golf Spot
about: The Golf Spot is a private, members-only indoor golf facility located in Livonia, Michigan. It operates exclusively on a membership basis, offering unlimited access to its state-of-the-art simulators without public play or walk-ins. The venue is equipped with Foresight GCHawk and GC2 launch monitors, providing elite-level technology for both serious practice and entertainment. Membership is limited, designed to create an exclusive, private country club atmosphere with 24/7 access for members.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 unlimited access to premium simulators with no booking restrictions
Exclusive, private country club atmosphere with no overcrowding
Professional-grade Foresight technology for accurate data and practice
Founding membership offers a one-time special rate with price increase after first 30 members
Full self-serve access and private event options

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring or order their own food and drinks
Alcohol inquiries require discussion about VIP memberships

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content doesn't explicitly state if clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring or order your own food and drinks while playing. Water and Gatorade are available for purchase at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 2 hours of play are allotted for 2-man bays and 3 hours for 4-man bays.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, The Golf Spot is a members-only facility focused on serious golf and private events, with no specific mention of kid-friendly features or activities.
